interaction_phrase: top U.S. industry and academic leaders
occurrence_sentence: The White House Office of Science and Technology Policy (OSTP), the National Science Foundation (NSF) and over a dozen top U.S. industry and academic leaders launched the National Q-12 Education Partnership, a new initiative to expand access to K-12 quantum information science (QIS) education.

interaction_phrase: launched the National Q-12 Education Partnership
occurrence_sentence: The White House Office of Science and Technology Policy (OSTP), the National Science Foundation (NSF) and over a dozen top U.S. industry and academic leaders launched the National Q-12 Education Partnership, a new initiative to expand access to K-12 quantum information science (QIS) education.

interaction_phrase: NSF is awarding nearly $1 million to QIS education efforts
occurrence_sentence: As part of today's announcement, NSF is awarding nearly $1 million to QIS education efforts, including the establishment of the Q2Work Program to support quantum education workforce development across the country.

interaction_phrase: the United States has prioritized quantum research and development
occurrence_sentence: Under President Trump's leadership, the United States has prioritized quantum research and development, and now we will be among the first in the world to make QIS education tools and resources available to K-12 students and educators nationwide.
